title: Prefer 'Convert.ToHexString' and 'Convert.ToHexStringLower' over call chains based on 'BitConverter.ToString'
description: Use 'Convert.ToHexString' or 'Convert.ToHexStringLower' when encoding bytes to a hexadecimal string representation. These methods are more efficient and allocation-friendly than using 'BitConverter.ToString' in combination with 'String.Replace' to replace dashes and 'String.ToLower'.
